title: Stemodia linearifolia
taxonomy: Stemodia linearifolia belongs to the family Scrophulariaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as figworts. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics, such as its leaf and flower structure. The genus Stemodia is a group of annual or perennial herbs, and Stemodia linearifolia is one of the species within this genus. This classification is part of the larger classification system in botany, which includes the kingdom, phylum, class, order, family, genus, and species. Further research is needed to confirm the exact classification of Stemodia linearifolia.
